Thanks for sending a pull request. Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before
opening one if you haven't already.

PRs that don't follow the checklist below will get a request for
changes; that costs you time and ours.
-->

## What does this change, and why?

<!-- A short description. Reference any related issue or discussion. -->

Closes #

## How was this tested?

<!-- For code changes: describe the tests you added or ran. PRs without
tests for new behavior will not land. -->

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe what you ran)
- [ ] CI passes locally

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) — DCO required
- [ ] The change is in scope for this project (see CONTRIBUTING)
- [ ] No new license checks, tier gates, or telemetry added to the open code paths
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, internal URLs, or customer data committed
- [ ] Public API changes are documented

## Anything reviewers should focus on?

<!-- Architectural decisions, trade-offs, places where you're unsure. -->
